preToolUse.bash: payload=$(cat); if printf '%s' "$payload" | grep -Eiq '(AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|-----BEGIN (RSA|OPENSSH|EC|DSA)? ?PRIVATE KEY-----|password[[:space:]]*[=:]|api[_-]?key[[:space:]]*[=:]|secret[[:space:]]*[=:]|\.env([^.]|$)|secrets/|prod[^/]*\.ya?ml)'; then printf '%s\n' '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Denied by Copilot guardrail: possible secret, .env, secrets path, or production config detected. Use synthetic values, update examples only, or ask for explicit human approval with a narrower scope."}'; else printf '%s\n' '{}'; fi
